metadata.observability_note: Scores reflect observable signals in reported news events, not governance outcomes. Absence of signal is not evidence of absence of behaviour. Countries with fewer than 30 events should be interpreted with caution.
metadata.citation: POLIS — Public Leadership Observation & Insight System. Change-alongside, 2026. https://polis-dashboard.streamlit.app
